reasons: Franco can suppress Lunox before she uses Brilliance.
Hook and suppression punish Lunox when her invulnerability or blink options are unavailable.

proof.summary: Lunox is dangerous when Brilliance or Darkening is available, but Franco can punish her if he catches her before those defensive tools are used.
worksBestWhen: Franco waits for Lunox to spend Brilliance or blink.
Franco's team follows up during suppression.
failureCases: Lunox keeps distance and forces Franco to engage through frontline.

reasons: Kaja can suppress Lunox before she enters invulnerable state.
Dragging Lunox into allied burst is effective when her escape cycle is down.

proof.summary: Lunox wants to choose when to become invulnerable or blink, while Kaja can suppress her during the gap before she activates those tools.
worksBestWhen: Kaja commits only when allied burst is ready.
failureCases: Lunox uses Brilliance before Kaja reaches her.
Kaja catches Lunox without damage follow-up.

reasons: Saber can punish Lunox during the window when Brilliance is unavailable.
His targeted airborne burst is useful against squishy mages if timed after defensive cooldowns.

proof.summary: Lunox survives burst through correct Brilliance timing, so Saber works best by waiting for Brilliance cooldown before using Triple Sweep.
worksBestWhen: Saber confirms Lunox has used Brilliance.
Saber has enough damage to finish during crowd control.
failureCases: Lunox survives the combo and counter-bursts.

reasons: Chou can kick Lunox out of position if he catches her before Brilliance.
Control immunity helps Chou approach through some mage control tools.

proof.summary: Lunox wants controlled spacing and defensive timing, while Chou can force displacement and punish her if she delays Brilliance.
worksBestWhen: Chou approaches from fog or flank.
Chou times engage after Lunox uses a defensive spell.
failureCases: Chou kicks Lunox away from allied damage.

reasons: Natalia can pressure Lunox before Lunox safely sets her fight rhythm.
Lunox is vulnerable if Natalia catches her without Brilliance or near isolated jungle paths.

proof.summary: Lunox wants to manage cooldowns safely, while Natalia threatens sudden backline pressure and punishes isolated positioning.
worksBestWhen: Natalia waits until Lunox's defensive cooldown is used.
Natalia approaches from fog and avoids minion vision.
failureCases: Natalia is revealed before she reaches Lunox.
